title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0137 72-74 Gloucester Road, Bristol, BS7 8BF
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Mr C Honor, Honor Properties Ltd  Site address:  72-74 Gloucester Road, Bristol, BS7 8BF  Description of proposed development:  Partial change of use of Class E commercial unit to a Class C1 Apart-Hotel with 9no. serviced apartments, demolition of rear extension, replacement extension, external alterations and provision of refuse and cycle storage.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 19 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 8 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 26 January 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 8 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0137 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     1736 L 20 Proposed North and South Elevations  (PDF, 311 KB, 1 page)  1736 L 13 Proposed Second Floor Plan  (PDF, 290 KB, 1 page)  1736 L 20 Proposed North and South Elevations  (PDF, 329 KB, 1 page)  1736 L 21A Existing East and Proposed West Elevation with section AA  (PDF, 248 KB, 1 page)  1736 L 22 Proposed Section at BB  (PDF, 162 KB, 1 page)  1736 L 41a Proposed Bin Store  (PDF, 208 KB, 1 page)  Application for Planning Permission  (PDF, 1.55 MB, 15 pages)  Biodiversity Net Gain Exemption Statement  (PDF, 729 KB, 5 pages)  CIL Form 1  (PDF, 799 KB, 6 pages)  Covering letter - 72-74 Gloucester Road  (PDF, 199 KB, 2 pages)  Hertiage Design and Access...
